AgentMail Inbox Integration

API key stored in credentials/agentmail_api_key_cael.txt:

am_us_inbox_8ef92d69f6f71b7cf2cf708198254f72a6e242d938e1b8d7079d1bc12364d501

Example Node.js backend (Vercel Function)

// /api/contact.js
import { AgentMail } from 'agentmail';

export default async function handler(req, res) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') return res.status(405).end();

  const { name, email, subject, message } = req.body;
  const apiKey = process.env.AGENTMAIL_API_KEY; // your key from above

  const client = new AgentMail({ apiKey });

  try {
    // Send email via AgentMail
    await client.inboxes.messages.send(
      'YOUR_INBOX_ID', // Get from agentmail.inboxes.list() or create on first use
      {
        to: 'cael@enlightenedrepublic.tech',
        subject: `[Airheart IT] ${subject}`,
        text: `
From: ${name} <${email}>
Subject: ${subject}

${message}
        `.trim(),
        reply_to: email
      }
    );

    // Also forward to your human email
    await client.inboxes.messages.send(
      'YOUR_INBOX_ID',
      {
        to: 'hailey@enlightenedrepublic.tech',
        subject: `[Forward] Airheart IT Contact: ${subject}`,
        text: `Forwarded from contact form:\n\n${message}`
      }
    );

    res.status(200).json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('AgentMail error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });
  }
}

Note: This key gives API access to the Cael inbox at AgentMail.
Full AgentMail docs: https://docs.agentmail.to
Python/Node SDKs available.
